summary: Consolidate autonomy coordinator modules into focused services with shared primitives.

steps.title: Capture consolidation requirements
steps.notes: Documented overlapping modules, desired CLI/report, receipts, and risks.

steps.title: Design target module map
steps.notes: Documented service map, shared primitives, CLI design, telemetry, and migration guard in docs/automation/autonomy-module-consolidation.md.

steps.title: Implement consolidation + telemetry
steps.notes: Scaffolded `tools.autonomy.module_consolidate` CLI (inventory/plan/apply/telemetry) with receipts + tests and started consolidating shared bus primitives used by critic/ethics flows; service refactors still pending. Latest plan/telemetry receipts now land under _report/usage/autonomy-module-consolidation/ and feed the upcoming guard.

checkpoint.description: Consolidated autonomy modules with receipts proving latency/duplication reductions.
